description: A designed dark-navy 'year in review' infographic from the Department of Labor. The top third is a photograph of President Trump in a dark suit and light-blue tie speaking into a microphone, with a blurred American flag behind him. Below, white text reads 'One Year of' (italic serif) over a large bold all-caps 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST!', followed by an italic subhead in a small box: 'President Trump has delivered:'. Beneath are two columns of checklist items, each preceded by a checked checkbox, in white serif caps: left column - NO TAX ON TIPS; SOCIAL SECURITY TAX CUTS; NO TAX ON OVERTIME; $259 MILLION IN BACK-WAGES RECOVERED; PELL GRANTS FOR SKILLED TRADES; LOWER COMPLIANCE COSTS FOR BUSINESSES; PROTECTION OF AMERICAN JOBS. Right column - 200 H-1B FRAUD AND ABUSE INVESTIGATIONS; AMERICAN JOB GAINS; 2,644 NEW APPRENTICESHIP PROGRAMS; FINANCIAL FREEDOM IN 401(K) INVESTMENTS; COMMITMENT TO 'MADE IN AMERICA'; HISTORIC FAIR TRADE DEALS; REDUCED REGULATIONS ON SMALL BUSINESSES. A small DOL seal sits at the bottom. The checkbox 'accomplishments checklist' format conveys a tally of delivered promises. Messaging technique: statistical/achievement self-promotion tying worker benefits to the anti-H-1B and 'America First' agenda. Target audience: American workers and supporters, marking the first anniversary of the administration.
notable_text: One Year of AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST!; President Trump has delivered:; 200 H-1B FRAUD AND ABUSE INVESTIGATIONS; $259 MILLION IN BACK-WAGES RECOVERED; 2,644 NEW APPRENTICESHIP PROGRAMS
